payload.answer: I found a relationship conflict for Sara: she is currently recorded as your daughter, while the new input says she is your niece. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Replace the existing relationship: record Sara as your niece instead of your daughter.
Keep the existing relationship: leave Sara recorded as your daughter and ignore the new niece statement.
Keep both relationships as separate possibilities because the intended relationship is ambiguous.
Ask for clarification before making any change.
